creator: tkato432@yahoo.com
text:
Remake of the patch against current tree.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	devel_m17n-db.diff
#	devel_m17n-docs.diff
#	devel_m17n-lib.diff
#
echo x - devel_m17n-db.diff
sed 's/^X//' >devel_m17n-db.diff << 'END-of-devel_m17n-db.diff'
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/Makefile devel/m17n-db/Makefile
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/Makefile	2008-06-07 00:20:39.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-db/Makefile	2008-08-05 05:11:39.000000000 +0900
X@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
X #
X 
X PORTNAME=	m17n-db
X-PORTVERSION=	1.5.1
X-PORTREVISION=	1
X+PORTVERSION=	1.5.2
X CATEGORIES=	devel
X MASTER_SITES=	http://www.m17n.org/m17n-lib-download/:m17n \
X 		${MASTER_SITE_GNU:S/$/:glibc/}
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/distinfo devel/m17n-db/distinfo
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-db/distinfo	2008-02-29 01:20:34.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-db/distinfo	2008-08-05 05:13:02.000000000 +0900
X@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
X-MD5 (m17n-db-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 1627c9d8808115567412192a595a434b
X-SHA256 (m17n-db-1.5.1.tar.gz) = ca67cab22cebe6a4279fb8944d471d964cb711a223de788e78890091a23510e7
X-SIZE (m17n-db-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 1280954
X+MD5 (m17n-db-1.5.2.tar.gz) = 1d23fdcd8395acdb662de28e8bad4dc5
X+SHA256 (m17n-db-1.5.2.tar.gz) = d05ecb11faafffbb7f07c6620a75d612bf27009e06da0e71a2163b2292bdd448
X+SIZE (m17n-db-1.5.2.tar.gz) = 1284002
X MD5 (glibc-2.3.6.tar.bz2) = bfdce99f82d6dbcb64b7f11c05d6bc96
X SHA256 (glibc-2.3.6.tar.bz2) = e73ff5eddea95d09238b41d3c9c4d9ccddcf99fcc93d04956599c91c704f4a8e
X SIZE (glibc-2.3.6.tar.bz2) = 14014977
END-of-devel_m17n-db.diff
echo x - devel_m17n-docs.diff
sed 's/^X//' >devel_m17n-docs.diff << 'END-of-devel_m17n-docs.diff'
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-docs/Makefile devel/m17n-docs/Makefile
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-docs/Makefile	2008-08-23 15:27:52.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-docs/Makefile	2008-08-23 15:44:34.000000000 +0900
X@@ -6,18 +6,19 @@
X #
X 
X PORTNAME=	m17n-docs
X-PORTVERSION=	1.5.0
X+PORTVERSION=	1.5.2
X CATEGORIES=	devel
X MASTER_SITES=	http://www.m17n.org/m17n-lib-download/
X 
X MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
X COMMENT=	The m17n library documentation
X 
X-USE_GNOME=	gnometarget
X GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
X 
X MAN1=		m17n-config.1 m17n-db.1
X-MAN3=		m17nCharacter.3m17n \
X+MAN3=		M17NObjectHead.3m17n \
X+		MDrawMetric.3m17n \
X+		m17nCharacter.3m17n \
X 		m17nCharset.3m17n \
X 		m17nChartable.3m17n \
X 		m17nConv.3m17n \
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-docs/distinfo devel/m17n-docs/distinfo
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-docs/distinfo	2008-02-29 01:20:34.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-docs/distinfo	2008-08-05 05:12:54.000000000 +0900
X@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
X-MD5 (m17n-docs-1.5.0.tar.gz) = fd050874138dcd2c529a13a6df79e7b6
X-SHA256 (m17n-docs-1.5.0.tar.gz) = 4f1eb27d2dcf003ec298b26c77a48eb8d0a8c0fa30bdc432eea48101dfcccda0
X-SIZE (m17n-docs-1.5.0.tar.gz) = 2325655
X+MD5 (m17n-docs-1.5.2.tar.gz) = 4fc8a4a60fbeafa0340e011a9bed0800
X+SHA256 (m17n-docs-1.5.2.tar.gz) = 3fb9ab259dab57caf4dc5827ce788c981d97548137886fbb9d138c63d0b5cb6d
X+SIZE (m17n-docs-1.5.2.tar.gz) = 2289798
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-docs/pkg-plist devel/m17n-docs/pkg-plist
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-docs/pkg-plist	2008-08-23 08:54:46.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-docs/pkg-plist	2008-08-23 15:47:24.000000000 +0900
X@@ -6,65 +6,7 @@
X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/el-kbd.png

X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/functions_enum.html

X-%%DOCSDIR%%/html/globals.html

X-%%DOCSDIR%%/html/globals_func_0x63.html

X-%%DOCSDIR%%/html/globals_vars_0x69.html

X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/group__m17nCharacter.html
X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/group__m17nCharset.html
X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/group__m17nChartable.html
X@@ -100,6 +42,7 @@
X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/icon-bn-itrans.png
X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/icon-bn-unijoy.png
X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/icon-bo-wylie.png

X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/icon-el-kbd.png
X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/icon-en-ispell.png
X@@ -145,6 +88,7 @@

X %%DOCSDIR%%/html/icon-unicode.png

echo x - devel_m17n-lib.diff
sed 's/^X//' >devel_m17n-lib.diff << 'END-of-devel_m17n-lib.diff'
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-lib/Makefile devel/m17n-lib/Makefile
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-lib/Makefile	2008-08-20 14:18:48.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-lib/Makefile	2008-09-01 07:11:49.000000000 +0900
X@@ -6,33 +6,39 @@
X #
X 
X PORTNAME=	m17n-lib
X-PORTVERSION=	1.5.1
X-PORTREVISION=	1
X+PORTVERSION=	1.5.2
X CATEGORIES=	devel
X MASTER_SITES=	http://www.m17n.org/m17n-lib-download/
X 
X MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
X COMMENT=	A library for the multilingual text handling
X 
X-BUILD_DEPENDS=	m17n-db>=1.5.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/m17n-db
X+BUILD_DEPENDS=	m17n-db>=1.5.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/m17n-db
X LIB_DEPENDS=	fribidi.0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/fribidi \
X 		gd.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/gd \
X 		otf.0:${PORTSDIR}/print/libotf
X-RUN_DEPENDS=	m17n-db>=1.5.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/m17n-db
X+RUN_DEPENDS=	m17n-db>=1.5.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/m17n-db
X 
X USE_XORG=	xaw xft xt
X-USE_GNOME=	gnometarget libxml2 pkgconfig
X+USE_GNOME=	libxml2 pkgconfig
X USE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf:262 libtool:15
X CONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="-I${LOCALBASE}/include" \
X 		LDFLAGS="-L${LOCALBASE}/lib"
X USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
X 
X-OPTIONS=	ANTHY	"With Anthy support" off \
X+OPTIONS=	NLS	"Native language support" on \
X+		ANTHY	"With Anthy support" off \
X 		ISPELL	"With Ispell support" off \
X 		THAI	"With libThai support" off
X 
X .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X 
X+.if defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
X+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-nls
X+.else
X+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
X+.endif
X+
X .if defined(WITH_ANTHY)
X LIB_DEPENDS+=	anthy.1:${PORTSDIR}/japanese/anthy
X .else
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-lib/distinfo devel/m17n-lib/distinfo
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-lib/distinfo	2008-02-29 01:20:35.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-lib/distinfo	2008-08-05 05:13:10.000000000 +0900
X@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
X-MD5 (m17n-lib-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 1fc48e2e2f42a6bb966026b61834d089
X-SHA256 (m17n-lib-1.5.1.tar.gz) = e06ba9e2b39553c50c903667e164b4cc2e3a44dea5a20b75c8b5799141f435f5
X-SIZE (m17n-lib-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 990729
X+MD5 (m17n-lib-1.5.2.tar.gz) = d4d51ff3866e702b97eb173f35eee1e3
X+SHA256 (m17n-lib-1.5.2.tar.gz) = 389cc05194e9a1f9e58b186c3fcd60d7fee2a6f627c3ea8f9c944d69983721f1
X+SIZE (m17n-lib-1.5.2.tar.gz) = 997592
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-lib/files/patch-examples__Makefile.in devel/m17n-lib/files/patch-examples__Makefile.in
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-lib/files/patch-examples__Makefile.in	2008-02-29 01:20:35.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-lib/files/patch-examples__Makefile.in	1970-01-01 09:00:00.000000000 +0900
X@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
X---- example/Makefile.in.orig	Fri Dec 28 10:11:44 2007
X-+++ example/Makefile.in	Sun Dec 30 22:34:16 2007
X-@@ -328,7 +328,7 @@
X- sysconfdir = @sysconfdir@
X- target_alias = @target_alias@
X- BASICPROGS = m17n-conv
X--common_ldflags = ${top_builddir}/src/libm17n-core.la ${top_builddir}/src/libm17n.la
X-+common_ldflags = ${top_builddir}/src/libm17n-core.la ${top_builddir}/src/libm17n.la $(INTLLIBS)
X- common_ldflags_gui = ${common_ldflags} ${top_builddir}/src/libm17n-flt.la ${top_builddir}/src/libm17n-gui.la
X- AM_CPPFLAGS = @CONFIG_FLAGS@
X- m17n_date_SOURCES = mdate.c
Xdiff -urN /usr/ports/devel/m17n-lib/files/patch-src__Makefile.in devel/m17n-lib/files/patch-src__Makefile.in
X--- /usr/ports/devel/m17n-lib/files/patch-src__Makefile.in	1970-01-01 09:00:00.000000000 +0900
X+++ devel/m17n-lib/files/patch-src__Makefile.in	2008-09-01 07:06:51.000000000 +0900
X@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
X+--- src/Makefile.in.orig	2008-06-23 14:59:44.000000000 +0900
X++++ src/Makefile.in	2008-09-01 06:57:24.000000000 +0900
X+@@ -402,7 +402,7 @@
X+ 	textprop.h textprop.c \
X+ 	mtext-lbrk.c mtext-wseg.c
X+ 
X+-libm17n_core_la_LIBADD = @XML2_LD_FLAGS@ @THAI_WORDSEG_LD_FLAGS@
X++libm17n_core_la_LIBADD = @XML2_LD_FLAGS@ @THAI_WORDSEG_LD_FLAGS@ @LTLIBINTL@
X+ libm17n_core_la_LDFLAGS = -export-dynamic ${VINFO}
X+ libm17n_la_SOURCES = \
X+ 	charset.h charset.c \
END-of-devel_m17n-lib.diff
exit
